brightens_after_switch_change: After the red-boxed switch action occurs, which labeled bulb becomes brighter?
Which bulb becomes brighter after the shown switch action?
Compare the circuit before and after the red-boxed switch action. Which labeled bulb brightens?
Using the bulb resistances and topology, which bulb becomes brighter after the switch action?
Select the label of the bulb that brightens after the shown switch action.
dims_after_switch_change: After the red-boxed switch action occurs, which labeled bulb becomes dimmer?
Which bulb becomes dimmer after the shown switch action?
Compare the circuit before and after the red-boxed switch action. Which labeled bulb dims?
Using the bulb resistances and topology, which bulb becomes dimmer after the switch action?
Select the label of the bulb that dims after the shown switch action.
turns_on_after_switch_change: After the red-boxed switch action occurs, which labeled bulb turns on?
Which bulb turns on after the shown switch action?
Compare the circuit before and after the red-boxed switch action. Which labeled bulb turns on?
Using the bulb resistances and topology, which bulb is off before the switch action and on afterward?
Select the label of the bulb that turns on after the shown switch action.
turns_off_after_switch_change: After the red-boxed switch action occurs, which labeled bulb turns off?
Which bulb turns off after the shown switch action?
Compare the circuit before and after the red-boxed switch action. Which labeled bulb turns off?
Using the bulb resistances and topology, which bulb is on before the switch action and off afterward?
Select the label of the bulb that turns off after the shown switch action.

scene:circuit_state_change_diagram.object_description: a visible ideal-battery circuit with five labeled bulbs, resistance labels, and one red-boxed switch action cue

query:brightens_after_switch_change.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "changed_switch" and each visible bulb label B1 through B5 to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the switch action cue and each bulb symbol with its resistance label
query:brightens_after_switch_change.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the bulb that becomes brighter after the switch action as a string, for example "B2"

query:dims_after_switch_change.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "changed_switch" and each visible bulb label B1 through B5 to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the switch action cue and each bulb symbol with its resistance label
query:dims_after_switch_change.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the bulb that becomes dimmer after the switch action as a string, for example "B2"

query:turns_on_after_switch_change.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "changed_switch" and each visible bulb label B1 through B5 to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the switch action cue and each bulb symbol with its resistance label
query:turns_on_after_switch_change.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the bulb that turns on after the switch action as a string, for example "B2"

query:turns_off_after_switch_change.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "changed_switch" and each visible bulb label B1 through B5 to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the switch action cue and each bulb symbol with its resistance label
query:turns_off_after_switch_change.answer_hint: set "answer" to the label of the bulb that turns off after the switch action as a string, for example "B2"
